'''Bessimir''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]], 15 [[Parsec/Legends|parsecs]] from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Two [[Moon/Legends|natural satellites]] orbited Bessimir.

==History==
It was the site of [[Operation Hammerblow]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group's]] final training mission.

At some point, it joined the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].

{{Planet-stub}}
